description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort by keeping you dry and comfortable. This tee offers you a stylised look that will make sure you look great on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on the weekend or for Friday casuals at your office. Product Details Blue, grey and white striped polo T-shirt, has a ribbed spread collar, chest buttoned placket, short sleeves, branding on the left chest and a vented hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
